---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

My current CV is available below.

[**Download CV (PDF)**](assets/cv_hazlett_april2025.pdf){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.25); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;">
<object data="assets/cv_hazlett_april2025.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px">
  <p>Your browser can't embed PDFs inline.
  <a href="assets/cv_hazlett_april2025.pdf">Download the CV here.</a></p>
</object>
</div>
```
